assertions.evidence: Edge page HTML includes class 'bg-gradient-to-br from-green-800 to-green-600' for empty BACKGROUND_TITLE image fallback.
In edge HTML, text 'Right image EN line 1' appears before image markup, matching imagePosition='right'.
Edge HTML includes placeholder class 'w-16 h-16 bg-gray-200 rounded' for empty icon URL.
Edge HTML includes 'relative h-64 bg-gray-300' plus overlay text, confirming empty image placeholder behavior.
No placeholder copy such as 'No title'/'Enter text' appears in rendered edge page content.
Code inspection: IconTextRowBlock returns null when items length is 0, so zero-item rows are hidden without crashing.
Rendered custom-view HTML contains utfs.io image URLs and next.config.ts includes utfs.io in images.remotePatterns.

summary: Rerun edge-block validation passed all 7 assertions.
